# Arcium Docs

## Docs

- [Configuration and Security](https://docs.arcium.com/arx-nodes/configuration-and-security.md)
- [Overview](https://docs.arcium.com/arx-nodes/overview.md)
- [Performance and Incentives](https://docs.arcium.com/arx-nodes/performance-and-incentives.md)
- [Cluster Forking & Migration](https://docs.arcium.com/clusters/cluster-forking-and-migration.md)
- [Incentivization](https://docs.arcium.com/clusters/incentivization.md)
- [Node Priority List & Alternative Selection Criteria](https://docs.arcium.com/clusters/node-priority-list-and-alternative-selection-criteria.md)
- [Overview](https://docs.arcium.com/clusters/overview.md)
- [Permissioned Clusters](https://docs.arcium.com/clusters/permissioned-clusters.md)
- [Sybil Resistance](https://docs.arcium.com/clusters/sybil-resistance.md)
- [Censorship Resistance & Fault Handling](https://docs.arcium.com/computations/censorship-resistance-and-fault-handling.md)
- [Computation Tasks](https://docs.arcium.com/computations/computation-tasks.md)
- [Defining & Commissioning Computations](https://docs.arcium.com/computations/defining-and-commissioning-computations.md)
- [Lifecycle of an Arcium Computation](https://docs.arcium.com/computations/lifecycle-of-an-arcium-computation.md)
- [Pricing and Incentives](https://docs.arcium.com/computations/pricing-and-incentives.md)
- [Intro to Arcium](https://docs.arcium.com/developers.md)
- [Overview](https://docs.arcium.com/developers/arcis.md): Introduction to Arcis, a Rust-based framework for writing secure MPC circuits on the Arcium network
- [Best practices](https://docs.arcium.com/developers/arcis/best-practices.md): Performance tips, debugging techniques, and testing strategies for Arcis circuits
- [Input/Output](https://docs.arcium.com/developers/arcis/input-output.md): Working with Enc types for encrypted inputs and outputs in Arcis circuits
- [Thinking in MPC](https://docs.arcium.com/developers/arcis/mental-model.md): Understand the mental model behind Arcis and why MPC circuits work differently from regular code
- [Operations](https://docs.arcium.com/developers/arcis/operations.md): Complete reference for supported operations, expressions, and patterns in Arcis MPC circuits
- [Primitives](https://docs.arcium.com/developers/arcis/primitives.md): Random number generation, cryptographic operations, and data packing in Arcis
- [Quick Reference](https://docs.arcium.com/developers/arcis/quick-reference.md): A quick reference cheatsheet for Arcis syntax and patterns
- [Types](https://docs.arcium.com/developers/arcis/types.md): Supported types in Arcis: integers, floats, arrays, structs, and encrypted types
- [Computation Lifecycle](https://docs.arcium.com/developers/computation-lifecycle.md)
- [Deployment](https://docs.arcium.com/developers/deployment.md)
- [Overview](https://docs.arcium.com/developers/encryption.md)
- [Sealing aka re-encryption](https://docs.arcium.com/developers/encryption/sealing.md)
- [Hello World with Arcium](https://docs.arcium.com/developers/hello-world.md)
- [Overview](https://docs.arcium.com/developers/installation.md)
- [Arcup Version Manager](https://docs.arcium.com/developers/installation/arcup.md)
- [Overview](https://docs.arcium.com/developers/js-client-library.md)
- [Tracking callbacks](https://docs.arcium.com/developers/js-client-library/callback.md)
- [Encrypting inputs](https://docs.arcium.com/developers/js-client-library/encryption.md)
- [Current Limitations](https://docs.arcium.com/developers/limitations.md)
- [Overview](https://docs.arcium.com/developers/migration.md)
